title: SimpleTrade
description:
Use Trade in your Server!
It's SimpleTrade Plugin!
body:
# Simple Trade!

### commands:
- **/trade <player>**
- Send a trade request
- **/tradeaccept [player]**
- Accept a trade request
- **/tradedeny [player]**
- Deny a trade request
- **/tradecancel**
- Cancel your trade request
- **/tradetoggle**
- Toggle receiving trade requests
- **/tradeblock <player>**
- Block or unblock a player from sending trade requests
